summary: The zone of stimulation involves fibroblasts, osteoclasts, and osteoblasts for bone turnover; new bone formation does not qualify as a distinct cell type within this region but instead results from their actions. Thus, it excludes options related to new bone formation directly. \boxed{\text{new bone formation}} This summary captures the essential point about what constitutes part of the zone of stimulation versus its outcomes without extraneous details.
